headline: What Makes Weyerhaeuser Company (WY) a Good Investment?
summary: Kopernik Global All-Cap Equity Fund is a value-oriented mutual fund managed by Kopernik Global Investors and is a sub-fund of Heptagon Fund ICAV. It recently released its Q1 2026 investor letter; a copy can be downloaded here. The strategy started the quarter positively but declined substantially in March. In the last third of the quarter, […]
